features: EVERYDAY ESSENTIAL: Cotton Tree large pack of 80 ready to use cotton wool pads are suitable for everyday use for cleansing or moisturising all skins types, perfect for delicate or sensitive skin
ADD FRAGRANCE: Add a few cotton wool balls to a small bowl, sprinkle with your favourite essential oil, place the bowl in a room or cupboard for a quick inexpensive fragrance diffuser
NATURAL COTTON: Hypoallergenic, made from 100 Percentpure natural cotton, perfect for daily use

GENTLE CLEANSING: Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directsto help dissolve makeup,making it easier and gentler on the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Convenient ready to use pack of 80 round cotton wool pads.
description: Product Description Cotton Treelarge pack of 80 ready to use cotton wool pads are suitable for everyday use for cleansing or moisutrising all skins types, perfect for delicate or sensitive skin. Cotton wool balls can also be used to make a quick inexpensive fragrance diffuser, add a few cotton wool balls to a small bowl, sprinkle with your favourite essential oil, place the bowl in a room or cupboard. Directions Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub.
